nasb.text: Jesus stretched out His hand and touched him, saying, “I am willing; be cleansed.” And immediately his leprosy was cleansed.

esv.text: And Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, saying, “I will; be clean.” And immediately his leprosy was cleansed.

cnv.text: 耶穌伸手摸他，說：“我肯，你潔淨了吧！”他的痲風立刻潔淨了。

ccb.text: 耶稣伸手摸他，说：“我肯，你洁净了吧！”那人的麻风病就立刻洁净了。

csbs.text: 耶稣伸出手来摸他，说：“我愿意，你洁净了吧！”那人的麻风病立刻就被洁净了。
